summary: Completed frontend testing of refactored Overview page with TradingView-like chart implementation using lightweight-charts v5. Most core functionality working correctly.

api_integration_issues.issue: Verdict data loading slowly or not returning complete data
api_integration_issues.impact: Verdict block shows 'Loading verdict...' indefinitely, Key Drivers and Key Risks sections not displayed

passed_tests: Overview page loads at /overview with big TradingView-like chart (65vh height)
Asset switcher works correctly (SPX/BTC/DXY buttons with proper active state styling)
Horizon switcher works correctly (7d/14d/30d/90d/180d/365d buttons with proper active state)
Chart displays OHLC candles using lightweight-charts v5 with professional appearance
Chart shows active prediction overlay (solid black line extending into future)
Chart shows archived history with trim logic (gray dashed lines)
History toggle button works (toggles between active/inactive states)
Chart has proper hover tooltips showing OHLC data with crosshair functionality
Chart has proper scaling, zoom, and scroll functionality
NO vertical NOW line present (as requested)
DXY fractal page still works at /fractal/dxy (loads properly)
SPX fractal page still works at /fractal/spx (loads properly)
Proper data-testid attributes present for robust testing
Chart legend shows 'Active Prediction' and 'History (not corrected)'
action_item_for_main_agent: Check backend API /api/ui/overview endpoint response time and data completeness. The verdict block and drivers/risks sections are not loading properly, showing 'Loading verdict...' state indefinitely.
